Tests the `toString` method of the `String` object in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that verifies the behavior of the `toString` method on a `String` object in JavaScript. It checks if calling `toString` on a `String` object created with the value `"abc"` returns the expected string `"abc"`. This test ensures that the `toString` method functions correctly for `String` objects, confirming that the method returns the string representation of the object. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on the correctness of the `toString` method for a specific case.
